title: Add crosslink tui command - interactive terminal dashboard with ratatui

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: Plan: Implementing Phase 1 TUI dashboard with ratatui 0.30 + crossterm 0.29. Architecture: (1) Add deps to Cargo.toml (2) Create tui/ module with Tab trait, App struct, main event loop (3) Implement IssuesTab with list view (sort/filter) and detail view (4) Add placeholder tabs for future phases (5) Add help overlay on ? key (6) Wire up crosslink tui CLI subcommand in main.rs (7) Add tests with TestBackend (8) Graceful cleanup via panic hook. Data access: reuse db.list_issues(), db.get_issue(), db.get_comments(), db.get_labels(), db.get_blockers(), db.get_blocking(). Key files: Cargo.toml, src/main.rs, src/commands/mod.rs, new src/commands/tui.rs, new src/tui/{mod.rs, issues_tab.rs, tabs.rs}

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: Completed Phase 1 TUI dashboard (crosslink tui command). Commit 5f93d66 on feature/crosslink-tui-dashboard. Delivered: Tab trait with 5 tabs (Issues active, 4 placeholder), IssuesTab with list view (sort/filter/search) and detail view (comments, deps, labels), help overlay, panic-safe terminal cleanup. 1285 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Ready for push and PR. Remaining unstaged files are worktree setup, not feature changes.
